--- Page 2 ---
Ref. No. VIPL/GeM/01023/24                                                                                                  Date: 03-07-224 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
WARRANTY CERTIFICATE 
 
 
 
 
We, M/s Voltriq India Pvt Ltd, hereby declare that the Voltriq products supplied to the 
purchaser under this bid/contract shall be of the highest quality and workmanship, and 
shall be entirely new. 
 
Warranty Clause: As per the GeM conditions of the contract, the warranty is valid from 
the date of delivery against manufacturing defects. 
 
 
 
 
Note: For warranty claims, please reach out to us at 1800-419-8353(Toll-Free No.) or 
 
enquiry@voltriq.in or https://voltriq.com/contact-us/ and provide the original invoice or 
 
register your complaint by phone.  
 
We offer on-site warranty services for Voltriq products throughout India. 
 
Best Regards 
Voltriq India Pvt Ltd 
 
 
Vikash Kr. Singh 
Vertical Head Govt & Retail sales 
  Email ID: vikash@voltriq.in 
  +91-926000 8000

--- Page 3 ---
Ref. No. VIPL/GeM/01021/24                                                                       
Date: 30-06-2024 
 
 
Shelf Life (End of Life) Certificate 
 
 
 
 
Subject: - Shelf Life (End of Life) Certificate 
 
 
 
Dear Sir/Ma’am, 
We, Voltriq India Pvt Ltd, hereby certify that the shelf life of our quoted products 
(Desktop Computers & All-in-One PCs) is up to 5 years, in accordance with the 
CPCB Guidelines on the Implementation of E-Waste (Management) Rules, 2016. 
 
 
 
 
 
Thanks & Regards  
 
For, and on behalf of Voltriq India Pvt Ltd 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Vikash Kr. Singh 
 
Vertical Head Govt & Retail sales  
 
vikash@voltriq.in 
 
+91-926000 8000
